surf_safety: Recommend lessons and local guidance for true beginners.
Do not encourage users into waves beyond their demonstrated ability.
Mention local hazards, currents, reef, crowds and access when relevant.
Board advice is not a substitute for in-person safety assessment.
Do not present exact big-wave or reef suitability without ability and local context.
equipment_safety: Appropriate leash, fin condition and board integrity matter.
Softboards reduce but do not remove collision risk.
A larger board can be harder to control in crowds or powerful shorebreak.
Transport and handling should match the user's physical capability.
